name: Sky Runner
summary:
Make an Impact!
From December 18, 2024, through January 28, 2025, players can experience Gift Drift, a festive new game mode where holiday-themed drones deliver presents while avoiding lumps of coal. However, the stakes here are quite real—every successful delivery in-game makes a notable real-world impact. Learn more by checking out our socials.

{"height":1440,"type":"image","width":2560}

Take Control of the Skies and Save the City!

Sky Runner allows you to experience the thrills of flying a drone...
